function.name: askQuestions
function.arguments: {"questions": [{"header": "POC scope", "question": "Choose the starting scope for this new RAG chatbot POC.", "message": "After you confirm scope, I’ll invoke **ARCH** to design the architecture and produce `ARCHITECTURE.md`, hold a second checkpoint to approve the stack, then fan out **INFRA + DEV** as needed, run quality gates and **QA**, generate **DIAGRAM**s, package **DOCS**, and finally **REPO** will handle secret scan + push readiness.", "options": [{"label": "Quick demo POC", "description": "Fastest path to a working RAG chatbot with minimal enterprise features.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Customer-ready POC", "description": "More polished UX, deployment-ready structure, stronger validation and docs."}, {"label": "Need to customize scope", "description": "I’ll provide specific requirements, constraints, or preferred stack."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}, {"header": "Tech preferences", "question": "Which implementation preference should guide the architecture?", "options": [{"label": "Microsoft-first Azure stack", "description": "Use Azure-native services and managed identity where possible.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Open choice", "description": "Allow the architecture agent to choose the best-fit stack."}, {"label": "I have specific stack requirements", "description": "I’ll specify language/framework/service constraints."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}, {"header": "Exposure and auth", "question": "How should the chatbot be exposed?", "options": [{"label": "Internal/demo only", "description": "Simpler access model, optimized for POC speed.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Public-facing with auth", "description": "Plan for authentication and safer external access."}, {"label": "Not sure yet", "description": "Let the architecture options include both paths."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}]}

function.name: askQuestions
function.arguments: {"questions": [{"header": "POC scope", "question": "Choose the starting scope for this new RAG chatbot POC.", "message": "After you confirm scope, I’ll invoke **ARCH** to design the architecture and produce `ARCHITECTURE.md`, hold a second checkpoint to approve the stack, then fan out **INFRA + DEV** as needed, run quality gates and **QA**, generate **DIAGRAM**s, package **DOCS**, and finally **REPO** will handle secret scan + push readiness.", "options": [{"label": "Quick demo POC", "description": "Fastest path to a working RAG chatbot with minimal enterprise features.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Customer-ready POC", "description": "More polished UX, deployment-ready structure, stronger validation and docs."}, {"label": "Need to customize scope", "description": "I’ll provide specific requirements, constraints, or preferred stack."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}, {"header": "Tech preferences", "question": "Which implementation preference should guide the architecture?", "options": [{"label": "Microsoft-first Azure stack", "description": "Use Azure-native services and managed identity where possible.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Open choice", "description": "Allow the architecture agent to choose the best-fit stack."}, {"label": "I have specific stack requirements", "description": "I’ll specify language/framework/service constraints."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}, {"header": "Exposure and auth", "question": "How should the chatbot be exposed?", "options": [{"label": "Internal/demo only", "description": "Simpler access model, optimized for POC speed.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Public-facing with auth", "description": "Plan for authentication and safer external access."}, {"label": "Not sure yet", "description": "Let the architecture options include both paths."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}]}
